breakdown: PR fixes rewards_box normalization in streaming passthrough by adding key fallbacks (xp→xp_gained, gold_pieces→gold) and applying normalize_rewards_box_for_ui before passthrough. Good naming and test coverage, but the WHY comment is misplaced (refers to booleans but deals with string keys), and the function lacks a docstring. Uses defensive defaults for error handling rather than typed errors.
key_changes: Add normalize_rewards_box_for_ui function with fallback logic for non-standard keys 'xp' and 'gold_pieces'
Add new test file testing_mvp/test_streaming_passthrough_normalization.py with E2E protocol test
Use copy.deepcopy to avoid mutating original rewards_box
Pop raw keys xp and gold_pieces after extracting normalized values
